issues.description: SearchDeck filter is incomplete. DSL specifies only maxCost:5, but card text requires: color=blue, type=ImpelDown, excludeByName=[Buggy], and look at exactly 5 cards from top of deck
Missing required filters: color (blue), type (ImpelDown), excludeByName (Buggy). Current filter only checks cost, which is not mentioned in card text
Missing action for 'place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order' - requires additional action or modifier to handle the 4 remaining cards

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 blue {Impel Down} type card other than [Buggy] and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.
